subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and becometh the Lord of the kingdom and the realm above, Who hath fulfilled His promise and manifested the Promised One unto the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد دارای ملک و ملکوت را لایق و سزاست که بوعد وفا فرمود و بظهور موعود عالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @law of Huququ'llah, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
